match.userMessage:

  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - FINAL WAVE\n\nWide cinematic frame. Scarlett stands at the water’s edge as the sun lowers. The coral on her lips catches the last warm light. She smiles directly to camera, then turns and walks along the shoreline.\n\nSUPER: CORAL. OUT NOW.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Final Cinematic Shot",
    "durationSeconds": 10,

    "storyBeat": "Closing emotional and brand payoff"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Cinematic wide shot in fresh modern editorial style with effortlessly cool golden hour energy, SCARLETT wearing a loose linen shirt with blonde hair lifting naturally in the breeze stands poised at the shoreline edge with weight shifted forward in quiet anticipation mid-breath smiling directly toward camera before turning to walk the wet sand, vast Bondi Beach stretches behind with gentle waves lapping the shore pale horizon surfers faint in the distance soft beige sand underfoot weathered textures visible along the promenade line, warm directional sunlight from the lowering sun bathes the entire frame in rich golden tones creating long soft shadows and luminous rim light across skin and fabric with subtle lens flare and shallow depth of field keeping foreground crisp while background ocean and sky melt into creamy bokeh, eye-level cinematic framing with natural handheld micro-movement energy lens flares and true-to-life warm color grading on 16:9 frame.",
      "negativePrompt": "text, logos, holograms, floating screens, heavy diffusion, artificial lighting, overexposed highlights, dark shadows, blurry motion, close-up framing",

        "subject": "SCARLETT in loose linen shirt",
        "environment": "Bondi Beach shoreline at sunset with waves, sand, distant horizon",
        "lighting": "Golden hour sunlight lowering, warm directional light with rim light and natural lens flare",
        "camera": "Wide eye-level cinematic shot with shallow depth of field and 16:9 framing",
        "composition": "Subject centered with expansive beach environment filling background and foreground sand leading into frame",
        "style": "Modern social-first editorial lifestyle photography with tactile real-life energy and clean bright grading",
        "technical": "High resolution, natural micro-movement handheld feel, true-to-life color",
        "atmosphere": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool, emotional brand payoff"
      }
    }
  },

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
(Strictly apply camera movement and pacing preferences)
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>
